title: Assistant Store Manager - Shoppers Stop Consulting Pvt Ltd - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Shoppers Stop Consulting Pvt Ltd - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Shoppers Stop Consulting Pvt Ltd invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Assistant Store Manager at our Rajkot location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Shoppers Stop Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Shoppers Stop Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shoppers Stop Consulting Pvt Ltd!
